methodology: See docs/bookkeeping.md 'Currency & inflation-adjustment conventions', point 6 (comparator countries). Base year 2015=100 for CPI index. FX rate = local currency units (LCU) per US$, WDI PA.NUS.FCRF (period average) unless noted. Pre-1999 years (1960-1998) were reported by WDI in Italian Lira (not retroactively restated to EUR by WDI itself, confirmed by inspection) -- rescaled here to EUR-equivalent using the EU's permanently fixed conversion rate (1 EUR = 1936.27 Italian Lira) so the whole series stays ratio-consistent with the EUR-denominated 2015 base year. This is an exact official conversion factor, not an estimate.
